Configuration for disabling UART hardware flow control on the NRF52_DK target.

# Purpose
The JSON configuration file specifies target-specific settings for a software project. It defines an override for the `NRF52_DK` target, setting the `target.uart_hwfc` parameter to `0`, which disables hardware flow control for the UART interface on this target.
